# summary

-

# checklist

- [ ] Content audit passed (`npm run content:audit`)
- [ ] Build passed (`npm run build`)
- [ ] Pages export verified (`npm run pages:verify`)
- [ ] Privacy/anonymity checked
- [ ] Theme checked against Blackbox Garden rules
- [ ] No unwanted route changes
- [ ] No unwanted design changes
- [ ] Public/unlisted/draft behavior checked
- [ ] `out/`, `.next/`, `privacy-blocklist.json`, and private data are not committed
